description_long: This is a bulbous ceramic vase with a narrow neck and a wide, rounded body, topped by a matte ochre-colored rim. The surface is adorned with a hand-painted landscape motif, featuring abstract tulip-like flowers on slender stems set against a blue and green horizon, with a soft gradient sky above. The flowers are rendered in muted tones of white, beige, and brown, each with subtle shading and delicate outlines. The lower portion of the vase transitions into earthy greens and browns, suggesting grassy terrain, while the upper half is dominated by cool blues and soft whites. The finish appears smooth and slightly matte, with a gentle sheen that catches the light. The overall impression is artistic and modern, suitable for decorative use in urban or contemporary settings.
description: A rounded ceramic vase with a narrow neck, ochre rim, and hand-painted abstract floral landscape in blue, green, and earth tones. The surface is smooth with a matte finish and artistic detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows two abstract tulip-like flowers, one white and one beige, against a blue and green landscape with a clear ochre rim.
description_view_1: This angle highlights three flowers, with the beige flower more prominent and the blue landscape band more visible.
description_view_2: Side view features the brown flower in the foreground, with the landscape wrapping around and less detail on the floral motifs.
description_view_3: Back view reveals a circular abstract motif and the white flower, with the blue and green landscape continuing around the vase.
